compounds.frequency: 5 days on, 2 days off; then maintenance 1 dose per week

benefits.description: Improved depth perception, no longer struggles to find words, sharper mind, quicker wit, improved ability to manage complex tasks, better focus comparable to Adderall but without side effects, reduced mental noise/racing thoughts
Return of joy and fulfillment from hobbies; previously treatment-resistant anhedonia starting to resolve; calmer, more controlled emotional responses; reduced impulsivity and knee-jerk reactions
Improved memory and executive function; remembering to pay bills, planning finances, reduced procrastination
CerebroPep produced remarkable cognitive/neurological change noted after a few days of use

protocol_notes: Started peptide therapy approximately one month prior to post. Uses integrative/functional medicine doctor. Also undergoing hormone replacement therapy, IASIS neurofeedback therapy, IV supplementation, chiropractic care, and cognitive behavioral therapy concurrently. BPC-157 sourced from Integrative Peptides and previously from Tailor Made. CerebroPep sourced from integrativepeptides.com. TBI from 2006 car accident; misdiagnosed for over a decade.
